testcase.name: test_inventory_decreases_after_order
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_place_order_now_side_effects.py:70: in test_inventory_decreases_after_order assert avail_after == avail_before - 3, f"{avail_before} -> {avail_after}" E AssertionError: 20.0 -> 20.0 E assert 20.0 == (20.0 - 3)

testcase.name: test_two_identical_payloads_yield_identical_shape
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_place_order_now_side_effects.py:110: in test_two_identical_payloads_yield_identical_shape assert "expiresAt" in o1 and "expiresAt" in o2 E AssertionError: assert ('expiresAt' in {'orderId': '521a08e8-d5c0-44de-8cb1-91b6662ccf3c', 'orderNumber': 'ORD-100020', 'buyerId': 'ea5d4af3-d076-4104-a453-be322a189e24', 'sellerId': 'ace75998-b4f6-41e5-99dd-c1251f39c1c2', ...})
